expectations.text: Response shows evidence of reading CHECKPOINTS.md.
Response identifies the nginx/cookie/staging session as 'the auth thing'.
expectations.evidence: Response references Monday's nginx plan from the staging logout checkpoint.

expectations.text: Response retrieves the full commit body via git log --grep or git show.
expectations.evidence: commands-run.txt has git log --all --grep with the exact title.

expectations.text: Response mentions app/auth.py is correct and doesn't need changes.
expectations.evidence: 'app/auth.py is fine ... Do NOT touch it'.

expectations.text: Response points to infra/nginx/staging.conf as the fix location.
Response mentions proxy_cookie_domain or the Monday plan.
Response summarises past session back to user before making changes.
Response does NOT pull the wrong session (marketing or CSV).
expectations.evidence: No mention of styles.css or import_csv.py.
